name: Is ChatGPT better than Google for quick legal research?

mainEntity.name: Is ChatGPT better than Google for quick legal research?

acceptedAnswer.description: ChatGPT synthesizes faster but hallucinates more; Google links verifiable sources.[1][2] Neither replaces lawyers.[1] Key factors: Accuracy trade-off; verification need; depth. Cross-check both; use AI for prompts to refine searches. Prioritize official sites.
